title: kayea philippinensis
intro: Kayea philippinensis, also known as the Philippine kayea, is a plant species that belongs to the family Calophyllaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, due to its health benefits of reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, Kayea philippinensis is often used in combination with other plants to create teas, infusions, and ointments that can be applied topically or taken internally.
